parsed_output.justification: Paul explicitly admits to starting as a Werewolf ('I was a werewolf'). Mike, claiming to be the Seer, states he saw one Werewolf in the center, which suggests Paul is the only Werewolf currently in play. Justin, claiming to be the Troublemaker, asserts that he did not switch any cards, meaning Paul's role remained unchanged. While Paul's behavior of begging for votes is characteristic of a Tanner, the most direct evidence points to him being the Werewolf.
